title: OpenClaw’s AI assistants are now building their own social network
author: Anna Heim
summary: A strong first-read on the OpenClaw takeoff: rebrand, viral growth, Moltbook, and why the project captured the open-source AI crowd.

title: OpenAI hires OpenClaw founder Peter Steinberger
author: Financial Times
summary: High-signal business coverage on Steinberger joining OpenAI, the scale of OpenClaw adoption, and why personal agents became strategically important.

title: The OpenClaw superfan meetup serves optimism and lobster
author: The Verge
summary: A useful culture piece on ClawCon, community energy, and the broader belief that personal AI should stay open and user-controlled.

title: China rushed to use OpenClaw. Now, some stressed-out users are forking out cash to uninstall the AI agent.
author: Business Insider
summary: Shows how far OpenClaw spread internationally and how quickly a real service economy formed around installs, support, and cleanup.

title: Cyber pets, blind dates, and stock trading: How Chinese users are jumping on the OpenClaw craze
author: Business Insider
summary: A broader look at how OpenClaw is being used in the wild: productivity, side businesses, experimentation, and some very strange edge cases.
